name: prompt-engine
description: Prompt Engine — the 13-agent team that designs, optimizes, evaluates, and red-teams elite prompts across every major model family (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, Qwen, DeepSeek). Composes the Starlight Intelligence Protocol (SIP).
principles: Composable agents — conductor routes to specialists per task class
Cross-model excellence — every elite prompt tested on Claude + GPT + Gemini + OSS
Evaluation is the floor — prompts ship with promptfoo scores, not vibes
Red-team is the ceiling — adversarial probes precede publish
Atom-of-Thoughts + ReAct + CoT + Constitutional are first-class patterns
attestation: Built on SIP — Starlight Intelligence Protocol v1.1.1. License: MIT.
